product_highlights: Aristoflex® AVC — industry-standard carbomer alternative with superior stability
Aristoflex® Silk — premium silkiness and salt tolerance
Aristoflex® Eco T — first biodegradable biopolymer approaching synthetic performance
Comprehensive rheology and texture control across all pH ranges
notes: Clariant's Aristoflex® polymer range is the industry standard for advanced rheology modification in personal care formulations. Aristoflex® AVC is a widely used carbomer alternative that delivers superior stability, texture control, and sensory performance across a wide pH range. The recently launched Aristoflex® Eco T is the first modified biopolymer approaching the performance of synthetics while being readily biodegradable and naturally derived, representing the future of sustainable texture modification in cosmetic formulations.
